relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: When misalignment happens, the righteous Advocate stands with the Father.
Mercy reaches not only us but the whole world.
Knowing is shown by keeping.
Claimed knowing without keeping is false.
Keeping the word completes Divine love in us.
Remaining in him means walking as he walked.
The command is old from the beginning.
The command is new as true light already shines.
Hating a sibling while claiming light is darkness.
Loving the sibling remains in light.
Hatred blinds the path.
Children are forgiven through his name.
Fathers know the beginning; young ones overcome harm.
The word remains in the strong ones.
Do not love the world-system.
Desire and boastfulness belong to the passing system.
The one doing Divine will remains.
Opposing-Messiah patterns mark the last hour.
Departure reveals non-remaining.
The Holy One gives anointing.
Truth recognizes the lie.
Denying Jesus as Messiah opposes Father and Son.
Confessing the Son holds the Father too.
Let the beginning-word remain in you.
The promise is age-long life.
The warning concerns those leading astray.
The anointing remains and teaches truth.
Remain in him with boldness for his appearing.
Doing justice shows birth from the Just One.

contemplative_note: 1 John 2 is remaining in light: love the sibling, resist the world-system, trust the anointing, and walk as Messiah walked.
